violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloths used with spray bottle sanitizing solutions. Recommend using single use towels or switching to buckets for wiping cloths.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Counter top flat grill not located under hood system.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Invert forks, spoons, and knives at customer service counter. Invert clam shell food containers on counters. Store boxes of cups and clam shells off floor in BOH storage area. Unprotected straws at customer self service counter.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor has grease build up near fryers and needs cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Label for original container of poisonous or toxic material was not legible. Unlabeled chemical spray bottle at FOH counter. QA sanitizer in Acid sanitizer spray bottle.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
